title: 帝王賞の後に・ツギツ（ハ）ギ

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Whoa! She came in first again!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeaaah! You're the best, Falco! The greatest
Umadol there is!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: She might actually win every race!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Goooo, Falcooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectators A and B
text_block_list.text: Goooo, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh... Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But it's not enough. It doesn't feel anything like that
day...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's got to be a way to make the concerts even
better...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ah! It's just, I can't afford to sit back and relax
just yet.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: There are still more races out there I have to win!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the JBC Classic. I imagine rivals are
going to start showing up looking to take me
down soon enough.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But I won't go down without a fight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as she says that, an unexpected visitor
appears.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: W-wait, aren't you...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The student council president?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon, please pardon the intrusion. I know
you've just finished running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Symboli Rudolf, the student council president
of Tracen Academy. With a whopping seven
crowns under her belt, she will certainly go down
in history.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Um, is something the matter? I'm not in trouble...
am I?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Is this about me passing out flyers from the rooftop? Or
performing in the staff room? Oh no, I don't even know
where to start...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, there's no need to be concerned. As a
matter of fact, I am here to applaud your efforts.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
First, I would like to give you my congratulations.
Followed by... my heartfelt appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As president of the student council, I've been
alerted to your rising popularity.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The dirt scene has been abuzz since you made
your announcement. Attendance, engagement...
All the figures have been on the rise.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As someone who deeply wishes for the prosperity
of all Umamusume, and as an Umamusume
myself...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I would like to express my sincerest gratitude for
all your hard work. I'm looking forward to even
more exceptional performances.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I-I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it... The president herself thanked
me personally...
choice_data_list: That's proof of how successful you've been.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh... I guess so.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If so, that only means more work for me! I want to
live up to her expectations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon is brimming with positivity after
receiving Symboli Rudolf's compliments.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But it's not enough. It doesn't feel anything like that
day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race has left her a little too worked up for my
liking, but now's not the time to put a damper on
things. With that in mind...
choice_data_list: Let's win the JBC Classic next!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That goes without saying! ☆ I don't have any
other choice!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna give it my all! Wooo! ☆
